case_title: EDUARDO AROLA VS. RYAN VAN CLEAVE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDUARDO AROLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN VAN CLEAVE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED DEFECTIVE AND INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE PRIOR TO THE HEARING: SUBSERVICE RECIPIENT STATED DEFENDANT NO LONGER LIVES THERE, AND THE SERVICE WAS DONE IN IDAHO. THIS IS NOT AN AUTO ACCIDENT CASE. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE IN STATE OF CALIFORNIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICES IS FILED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY AROLA, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT VAN CLEAVE, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
